title: Unable to locate package skopeo on Ubuntu 20.04
body:
opening a new issue in reference to this one - https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/1648 

It appears you can no longer install skopeo on a Ubuntu 20.04, is this correct or should we still be able to install the package. 

I tried to using the image `image: quay.io/skopeo/stable` with Gitlab but that also failed to run. Should there be a stable version available to use?
